title: Zero
description: After 6 years later, he is now wearing glasses.

title: Zero
description: You're beautiful as the day i've lost you.

title: 2B & 9S Chibi
description: Breaking free from YoRHA, they unravel the truth about their existence, and start to express their true emotions.

title: 2B & 9S Blindfolded Chibi
description: 2B is a Battler-Type Android capable of all-rounder combat, while 9S is a Scanner-Type Android with high-end hacking skills, serving the YoRHA Elite Military Force. 2B is the oh-not-so-sweet type of person, while 9S is the polar opposite. Their sole goal is to restore Earth from the damned Machine Lifeforms for the sake of humanity, sent by the Moon. Though coming from a strict Organization, things started to change as time flies by...

title: Lyza
description: Lyza is an infamous cybercriminal known on the net. Truth is, everything she does is for the sake of humanity, even when the whole world thinks the opposite. She is a very independant and a weird individual, who loves the tingling sensation of audio frequencies, that even outperforms a Navy Sonar Operator. Lyza is the top-of-the-class Student in P̶̧̯̭̼̝͚̱̘̲͓̘̈́͋͠r̷̢͚̳̋͂̈́̊̏̉̈́ö̶̹̟̎͂̿͜͜͝j̴̢̰̻̥̩͉̘͓̰̥̐̆͗̒̆̓͋͋̈́͜e̷̢̖͖̖̠͑͛̈́̎̾̎͌ͅͅc̵̡̗̪͎̹̱̬̪͇̹̬͌̓̒͒̈́̎̋t̸͇̜̱̟̓ ̸̘͎̗͓͙̩͓̪̌̏Ẑ̶̨̤̯̟͓̱̑̿͛̌̈͜͠ͅe̵̡̧̯̲̬̦̥̻̟̹͙̅̆̄͌͌̀͝͝͠ṟ̷̡͇͇̪͇̣̲̭͉̀͋̈́̓̇͛̎̉͘o̵̧̼̟̳̭̩̬͕̺̓̌̿̈́̓͂̾̇͜ͅ. She is even good at video games, where her username managed to be known by many, on top of global leaderboard. She used to work for the Government until when they backstabbed her. This caused her to be distraught on trusting anyone, as everything, her freedom, friends, loved ones are all gone. She is always the type to smile, but deep down, lies a hidden truth. Current whereabouts is unknown.

title: Hikaue Headshot
description: My first ever commissioned art, from my Roblox OC, for FREE ToT. I met the artist on a Roblox Art Server called FreeDraw, because back then I used to draw digitally on that game. Oh how time flies...
